modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to send mass email due to recipient limit error.

full_description_text: The user reported an issue while attempting to send out a newsletter via USD Email using Outlook. They encountered an error indicating that the message could not be delivered because the number of recipients exceeded the limit of 500. Additionally, they received notifications about an outbound notification being blocked and a high-severity alert regarding restrictions on their email sending capabilities. This situation has hindered their ability to communicate effectively with their audience.
short_description: Unable to send mass email due to recipient limit error.

Additionally, they received notifications about an outbound notification being blocked and a high-severity alert regarding restrictions on their email sending capabilities. This situation has hindered their ability to communicate effectively with their audience.
